mapper.sql: CD.CODE_DETAIL_SEQ AS codeDetailSeq, CD.CODE_GROUP_SEQ AS codeGroupSeq, CD.PARENT_CODE_DETAIL_SEQ AS parentCodeDetailSeq, CD.CODE AS code, CD.CODE_NAME AS codeName, CD.CODE_VALUE AS codeValue, CD.CODE_DESC AS codeDesc, CD.LEVEL_NO AS levelNo, CD.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, CD.USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(CD.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(CD.MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CODE_DETAIL CD WHERE CD.CODE_GROUP_SEQ = #{codeGroupSeq} AND CD.PARENT_CODE_DETAIL_SEQ IS NULL AND CD.LEVEL_NO = 2 ORDER BY CD.SORT_ORDER ASC, CD.CODE_DETAIL_SEQ ASC

SELECT
FROM CODE_DETAIL CD WHERE CD.PARENT_CODE_DETAIL_SEQ = #{parentCodeDetailSeq} AND CD.LEVEL_NO = 3 ORDER BY CD.SORT_ORDER ASC, CD.CODE_DETAIL_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CODE_DETAIL ( CODE_GROUP_SEQ, PARENT_CODE_DETAIL_SEQ, CODE, CODE_NAME, CODE_VALUE, CODE_DESC, LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, CREATE_DT, CREATE_ID, CREATE_IP, MODIFY_DT, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_IP ) VALUES ( #{codeGroupSeq}, #{parentCodeDetailSeq}, #{code}, #{codeName}, #{codeValue}, #{codeDesc}, #{levelNo}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CODE_DETAIL SET CODE = #{code}, CODE_NAME = #{codeName}, CODE_VALUE = #{codeValue}, CODE_DESC = #{codeDesc}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MODIFY_DT = NOW(), MODIFY_ID = #{modifyId}, MODIFY_IP = #{modifyIp} WHERE CODE_DETAIL_SEQ = #{codeDetailSeq}
